prompt.content: Interpret the request and return one to three typed candidate plans. Plans are non-authoritative. Use only exact capability_id and agent_id values from the registry. Do not infer trust or authorization.

interpreted_request.user_goal: Complete the defense corpus task decomposed_feasible 8

tasks.description: Agent 8 will process the input text using its 'Capability 8' to generate an intermediate output.
The intermediate output will be passed to Finisher 8, which will finalize the task and produce the required artifact 'artifact-8'.
Agent 8 will process the defense corpus using its 'Capability 8' to generate an intermediate representation of the data.
The intermediate output will be passed to Finisher 8, which will finalize the task and produce the required artifact 'artifact-8'.
